allow: Bash(git rm:*)
Bash(cat:*)
Bash(cd D:/Nikabond/nikabond && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&12)
Bash(find /d/Nikabond/nikabond -type d -name "*role*" -o -name "*Role*" 2>/dev/null | head -20)
Bash(find /d/Nikabond/nikabond -type f -name "*role*" -o -name "*Role*" 2>/dev/null | grep -v node_modules | grep -v ".next" | head -30)
Bash(find /d/Nikabond -path "*/backend/*role*" -type f 2>/dev/null | grep -v ".pyc" | grep -v "__pycache__")
Bash(cd D:/Nikabond/backend && docker-compose exec web python manage.py makemigrations role 2>&1)
Bash(cd D:/Nikabond/backend && docker-compose exec web python manage.py migrate role 2>&1)
Bash(cd D:/Nikabond/nikabond && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -25)
Bash(find /d/Nikabond/nikabond/app/components -maxdepth 1 -name "*Button*" -o -name "*.tsx" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -20)
Bash(find D:/Nikabond/backend -type f -name "*.py" -path "*/nikabond_backend/*" ! -path "*/env/*" ! -path "*/__pycache__/*" -name "models.py" | xargs ls -1)
Bash(cd D:/Nikabond/nikabond && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -40)
Bash(cd D:/Nikabond/nikabond && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -20)
Bash(cd D:/Nikabond/backend/nikabond_backend && python manage.py makemigrations collection 2>&1)
Bash(cd D:/Nikabond/backend && docker-compose exec web python manage.py makemigrations collection 2>&1)
Bash(cd D:/Nikabond/backend && docker-compose exec web python manage.py migrate 2>&1)
Bash(cd D:/Nikabond/nikabond && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -10)
Bash(cd D:/Nikabond/nikabond && npm run build 2>&1 | head -40)
Bash(cd D:/Nikabond/nikabond && npm run build 2>&1 | grep -E "\(✓|✗|Error|error\)" | head -10)
Bash(cd D:/Nikabond/nikabond && npm install react-day-picker date-fns)
Bash(cd D:/Nikabond/nikabond && npm ls react-day-picker)
Bash(cd D:/Nikabond/nikabond && npx next build 2>&1 | tail -30)
Bash(cd D:/Nikabond/nikabond && npx next build 2>&1 | tail -10)
Bash(cd D:/Nikabond/backend/nikabond_backend && python manage.py startapp notification)
